phrases.text_local: Πού βρίσκω τον πάγκο με το μέλι;
phrases.cultural_note: Honey producers often set up near fruit and produce stalls. Vendors selling regional products cluster together.

likely_response.local: Δεξιά από την εκκλησία, πάγκος με μέλι.
likely_response.translation_en: Look around the producers with local products, near the center of the market.

responses.english: Look around the producers with local products, near the center of the market.
responses.french: Δεξιά από την εκκλησία, πάγκος με μέλι.

phrases.text_local: Πού είναι το περίπτερο με το ελαιόλαδο;
phrases.cultural_note: In Greek open markets, vendors often cluster similar products. Olive oil stalls are typically found near produce sections where olives are sold.

likely_response.translation_en: Farther down, next to the fruits and olives.

responses.english: Farther down, next to the fruits and olives.

phrases.intent_en: How do I weigh olives before paying
phrases.text_local: Πώς ζυγίζω τις ελιές πριν πληρώσω;
phrases.cultural_note: Olive weighing is usually done at the stall using provided scales. Vendors may assist if requested.

likely_response.translation_en: Use the scales at the stall.

responses.english: Use the scales at the stall.

phrases.intent_en: Can I taste the cheese before buying
phrases.text_local: Μπορώ να δοκιμάσω το τυρί πριν το αγοράσω;
phrases.cultural_note: Cheese sampling is common practice at Greek markets to ensure customer satisfaction before purchase.
